data.description: XRP has rebounded, with its trading price climbing above $2. Institutional investors are showing increased interest in the altcoin, indicating that its upward trend may just be beginning.

data.title: Techficient launches OmniTrak, a cutting-edge digital term life insurance product by SBLI on its platform, revolutionizing field underwriting.
data.description: Boise, Idaho - In a recent announcement on January 14, 2026, Techficient introduced the integration of SBLI's OmniTrak onto its platform. This innovative digital term life insurance offering aims to provide customers with an enhanced experience and cost-effective options. By utilizing advanced technology, OmniTrak streamlines the insurance process and offers competitive pricing, making it a top choice for consumers seeking efficient and affordable coverage.

data.title: Metamaterials market set to reach $17.44 billion by 2035, growing at 27.36% CAGR, with antennas and radars dominating.
data.description: In Dublin, the metamaterials market report is now available, offering insights on the market distribution by type, product form, application, enterprise type, end-use industry, and geographical regions up to 2035. According to the data, the global metamaterials market is forecasted to increase from USD 1.55 billion to USD 17.44 billion by 2035, with a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 27.36%. The metamaterial revolution has overcome the constraints of traditional metals and significantly improved various industries.

data.title: Stock market update: Dow up slightly, AppLovin surges. Small caps rebound, biotech tanks on early results.
data.description: In the afternoon, small caps recover as a biotech company experiences a significant drop in value due to initial figures. The Dow shows a minor improvement. AppLovin makes a substantial leap in the market. Live coverage of these developments is available from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Taiwan Fund, Inc. reports Q1 earnings with net asset value per share of $67.52 as of Nov 30, 2025.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the Taiwan Fund, Inc. revealed its investment performance for the quarter ending November 30, 2025. The Fund, listed on NYSE as TWN, reported a net asset value per share of $67.52 at the close of business.

data.title: Delia Osegueda named Vice President of Global Partnerships at AIC Hotel Group, leading portfolio with brands like Nobu and Hard Rock.
data.description: In Miami on January 14, 2026, Delia Osegueda was appointed as the Vice President of Global Partnerships at AIC Hotel Group. With a portfolio covering various renowned hotel brands such as Nobu Hotels, Hard Rock Hotels, and AVA Resort and Spa, AIC Hotel Group is a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Z.AI unveils GLM-Image, first AI model trained without US chips. Beijing aims for self-reliance with Huawei hardware.
data.description: Z.AI recently launched GLM-Image, which was exclusively trained using Huawei chips. This development comes amidst Beijing's efforts to restrict the import of Nvidia H200 in order to promote self-sufficiency in artificial intelligence. The move highlights China's emphasis on domestic production and innovation in the AI sector.
